nodes.label: Rahul Bhaumik Research
nodes.description: Research across human-computer interaction, soft interfaces, smart textiles, design pedagogy, extended reality, AI-supported systems, and interaction design.

nodes.label: HCI and Interaction Design
nodes.description: Human-computer interaction, user experience, and interaction design research.

nodes.label: Soft and Deformable Interfaces
nodes.description: Flexible, deformable, material-driven, and embodied interfaces.

nodes.label: Smart Textiles
nodes.description: Textile-based interaction systems using sensing, embroidery, knitting, conductive yarns, and material structures.

nodes.label: Inductive Sensing
nodes.description: Inductive sensing for deformation-aware, soft, and 3D-printed interactive structures.

nodes.label: 3D-Printed Sensors
nodes.description: 3D printing, lattice structures, functional materials, and sensor-enabled interactive objects.

nodes.label: Automotive HCI
nodes.description: In-car interaction systems and interfaces for improved user experience.

nodes.label: Design Pedagogy
nodes.description: Design learning, creativity, design thinking, and pedagogical tools.

nodes.label: XR and Virtual Environments
nodes.description: Immersive and virtual environments for design, interaction, accessibility, and learning.

nodes.label: AI and ML Systems
nodes.description: AI, machine learning, intelligent systems, and multimodal computational systems.

nodes.label: Sustainable and Social Design
nodes.description: Design and technology for sustainability, community systems, indigenous knowledge, and social impact.

nodes.label: InSense3D: Designing Smart 3D-Printed Structures Leveraging Ferromagnetic Filaments for Inductive Deformation Sensing
nodes.description: Smart 3D-printed structures using ferromagnetic filaments and inductive deformation sensing.

nodes.label: Inductive Pressure Sensors Using 3D-Printed Structures With Tunable Stiffness
nodes.description: 3D-printed structures with tunable stiffness for pressure-sensitive interaction.

nodes.label: Flexible and Compressible 3D-Printed Hybrid Structures Using Magnetically Detectable PETG for Inductive Sensing
nodes.description: Flexible and compressible 3D-printed hybrid structures using magnetically detectable thermoplastic materials.

nodes.label: Interaction with a 3D Surface for an Innovative Input Experience on a Central Console
nodes.description: Interaction with a three-dimensional surface for automotive central console input.

nodes.label: Smart vernacular architecture: a framework for assessment and virtual reality-based visualisation of indigenous Toda dwellings
nodes.description: A framework for assessing and visualising indigenous Toda dwellings using virtual reality.

nodes.label: An AI-based pedagogical tool for creating sketched representation of emotive product forms in the conceptual design stages
nodes.description: An AI-based pedagogical tool for supporting sketched representation of emotive product forms.

nodes.label: An Intelligent ABM-based framework for developing pandemic-resilient urban spaces in post-COVID smart cities
nodes.description: An agent-based intelligent framework for pandemic-resilient urban spaces.

nodes.label: An Intelligent Virtual Environment for Designers with Reduced Motor Abilities
nodes.description: A virtual environment intended to support designers with reduced motor abilities.

nodes.label: An Inclusive Community Based Water Purification and Monitoring System for the Base of the Pyramid
nodes.description: A community-based water purification and monitoring system for base-of-the-pyramid contexts.

nodes.label: A deep-learning based multimodal system for Covid-19 diagnosis using breathing sounds and chest X-ray images
nodes.description: A deep-learning based multimodal system using breathing sounds and chest X-ray images.

nodes.label: A Gamified Model of Design Thinking for Fostering Learning in Children
nodes.description: A gamified design-thinking model for supporting learning and creativity among children.
